item.title: Version 1.8.5
item.description:
What's New in 1.8.5

Daily Notebook Monitoring

  • Dual Review Modes: Introduced "Daily Quick Check" alongside "Full Notebook Audit" to support high-frequency pulse monitoring.
  • Intelligent Mode Switching: Unified the entry point into a single "Notebook Review" module with a high-fidelity toggle in the setup phase.
  • Contextual Awareness: The interface now dynamically adapts titles, logic, and analytics based on the selected monitoring mode.

Analytics & History Redesign

  • Sidebar Navigation: Implemented Windows-optimized right sidebars in both History and Analytics for seamless switching between Audit and Daily datasets.
  • Isolated Data Streams: Formal Audits and Daily Checks now maintain completely separate performance trends to prevent frequent checks from skewing formal audit data.
  • Responsive Command Center: Redesigned the Analytics dashboard to support side-by-side criteria breakdown and trend visualization on desktop.

Modernized Drafts Management

  • Windows Dashboard UI: Complete ground-up redesign of the Drafts screen using an adaptive grid system optimized for wide screens.
  • Rich Content Previews: Draft cards now display teacher avatars, mode badges (DAILY/AUDIT), and a preview of the Grades/Subjects contained within.
  • Resumption Logic 2.0: Rewrote the draft resumption engine to use persistent memory (keepAlive) and absolute routing, ensuring data is never lost during app restarts.

Academic Schedule Precision

  • Intelligent Auto-Fill: New semesters now automatically default to 6-month durations, while rounds strictly follow the "+1 Day Gap" rule to prevent overlap errors.
  • Date Boundary Normalization: Refactored the core period service to include full-day coverage (00:00:00 to 23:59:59), resolving issues where data saved on the last day of a period would "vanish."
  • Scope-Aware Initialization: Starting a review now automatically picks a valid date within your currently selected Academic Scope.

Validation & UI Polishing

  • Strict Data Integrity: Enforced student selection requirement; the "Finish" button now remains disabled until a student is assigned to every notebook.
  • Teacher Context Pill: Added a tertiary-colored pill in the Review AppBar for persistent identification of the teacher under review.
  • Enhanced Selectors: Updated TigleSearchableDropdown to show "Name (Father)" in search but only "Name" in the selected field for a cleaner UI.
  • Stability Fixes: Resolved a critical crash in the DatePicker when future academic periods were selected.

Technical Changes

  • Version Bump: Upgraded to version 1.8.5+28.
  • Provider Refactor: Migrated ReviewSessionController to a non-reactive persistent state model for maximum data stability.
